title: New Employee Information and Forms | USCIS
content:
## New Employee Information and Forms
We're excited that you have joined us in our mission, to secure America’s promise as a nation of immigrants by overseeing lawful immigration to the United States. Your process of joining USCIS begins here and continues with an official onboarding program that your office has prepared for you.
This webpage provides information on what you need to do before you report; what you need to bring on your first day; and your benefits, pay, and leave as well as other information to help you make a smooth transition to your new career with USCIS.
- Forms to complete and return before you report : Download, complete and return these forms to USCIS Human Resources before you report.
- Forms to complete and bring on your first day : Learn about the forms you must download, complete and bring with you on your first day.
- Benefits : Read about your federal benefits, including time frames for enrolling in benefits and how to designate beneficiaries.
- Additional New Employee Resources
Please refer to your welcome letter for reporting instructions for your first day.
If you have any questions, please use our Human Resources email box or reach out to the HR specialist or assistant named on your tentative offer letter.
Also, please send us any feedback about this website through our USCIS Webmaster email box.
